top_signals.title: Iran and Israel Trade Missile Attacks, Straining Peace Talks
top_signals.summary: Israel and Iran exchanged missile strikes on Monday despite President Donald Trump’s calls for both sides to stop fighting and give peace talks a chance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Asia tech stocks extend sell-off with SoftBank dropping 6% as investors sour on AI-linked names
top_signals.summary: Asian tech stocks tracked overnight losses in U.S. tech names led by a sell-off in Broadcom.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Russia seeks to label two anti-Kremlin hacker groups as ‘extremist’
top_signals.summary: The groups have previously claimed responsibility for cyberattacks targeting critical infrastructure and government institutions in Russia and Belarus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Galaxy drops CLARITY Act odds to 60% as time is running out
top_signals.summary: Galaxy Digital says the Senate has a tight calendar ahead of the November elections, and the time needed to fix up and pass a key crypto bill is quickly fading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: South Korea names first female prime minister in decades to lead AI push
top_signals.summary: Lee Jae Myung hopes the former Naver CEO will help better use the nation's tech expertise for future growth and ensure its benefits spread more widely through the economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Arthur Hayes dumps WLD days after Maelstrom’s AI IPO pitch
top_signals.summary: Maelstrom’s Arthur Hayes has been on a selling spree recently, offloading positions in HYPE, ZEC, NEAR and now WLD.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The world runs on English law – let’s make the most of it
top_signals.summary: All governments yearn for growth levers that are affordable, credible and deliverable within a parliamentary term. This government is fortunate enough to have one: English common law, says Brandon Lewis There is a quiet truth about British global influence that rarely makes it into the conversation about economic growth. International litigants, when consulting a regulatory [...]
